requirement_topic.en: ALMM — Approved List of Models and Manufacturers (Grid-Tied PV Inverters)
requirement_topic.zh: ALMM — 经批准的型号和制造商名单（并网光伏逆变器）
requirement_topic.zht: ALMM — 經批准的型號及製造商名單（並網光伏逆變器）

summary.en: India's Ministry of New and Renewable Energy (MNRE) maintains the Approved List of Models and Manufacturers (ALMM). For government-funded, net-metered, or subsidy-linked solar projects, only ALMM-listed modules and — under the introduced List-II — inverters from listed manufacturers may be procured. ALMM registration requires application to MNRE with technical documentation and factory inspection; preference is given to domestically manufactured equipment under the Domestic Content Requirement (DCR) framework. [UNVERIFIED: the exact effective date and full project-scope of ALMM List-II for inverters; check current MNRE ALMM orders for the latest applicability.]
summary.zh: 印度新能源和可再生能源部（MNRE）维护「经批准的型号和制造商名单」（ALMM）。凡政府资助、净计量或受补贴的太阳能项目，只能采购已列入ALMM的组件，以及（根据已推出的List-II）已列入名单的逆变器制造商产品。ALMM注册须向MNRE提交技术文件并接受工厂检查；在国内含量要求（DCR）框架下优先采购国产设备。[未经核实：ALMM List-II适用逆变器的确切生效日期及完整项目范围；请查阅最新MNRE ALMM令。]
summary.zht: 印度新能源及可再生能源部（MNRE）維護「經批准的型號及製造商名單」（ALMM）。凡政府資助、淨計量或受補貼的太陽能項目，只能採購已列入ALMM的組件，以及（根據已推出的List-II）已列入名單的逆變器製造商產品。ALMM註冊須向MNRE提交技術文件並接受工廠檢查；在國內含量要求（DCR）框架下優先採購國產設備。[未經核實：ALMM List-II適用逆變器的確切生效日期及完整項目範圍；請查閱最新MNRE ALMM令。]

standards_or_laws: MNRE ALMM Order (latest revision — verify at mnre.gov.in/almm)
Domestic Content Requirement (DCR) provisions under applicable MNRE scheme orders

summary.en: China has no equivalent approved-manufacturer-list regime for grid-tied PV inverters intended for export markets. Chinese inverter manufacturers are regulated domestically under GB standards and CQC/CGC certification, but there is no government-maintained export whitelist analogous to ALMM. A Chinese manufacturer must independently apply to MNRE for ALMM registration to sell into ALMM-mandated Indian projects.
summary.zh: 中国对出口市场的并网光伏逆变器没有类似的「经批准制造商名单」制度。中国逆变器厂商在国内依据GB标准及CQC/CGC认证进行监管，但政府不维护类似ALMM的出口白名单。中国制造商须自行向MNRE申请ALMM注册，方可在受ALMM约束的印度项目中销售产品。
summary.zht: 中國對出口市場的並網光伏逆變器沒有類似的「經批准製造商名單」制度。中國逆變器廠商在國內依據GB標準及CQC/CGC認證進行監管，但政府不維護類似ALMM的出口白名單。中國製造商須自行向MNRE申請ALMM註冊，方可在受ALMM約束的印度項目中銷售產品。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 (photovoltaic grid-connected inverter — domestic CN standard)

gap.en: Significant market-access barrier: even a Chinese inverter that holds BIS certification (IS 16221) is NOT automatically ALMM-listed. For ALMM-mandated project categories (government, net-metered, subsidised), a non-listed inverter cannot be supplied regardless of other certifications. Chinese manufacturers must complete a separate MNRE ALMM registration — including factory audit — to access these project segments. [UNVERIFIED: whether ALMM List-II for inverters is currently mandatory or still phased-in; confirm scope with current MNRE orders before procurement decisions.]
gap.zh: 市场准入壁垒显著：即使中国逆变器已持有BIS认证（IS 16221），也不会自动列入ALMM。对于须遵守ALMM的项目类别（政府项目、净计量、受补贴项目），未列名的逆变器无论持有何种其他认证，均不得供货。中国制造商须单独完成MNRE ALMM注册（含工厂审核）方可进入上述项目细分市场。[未经核实：逆变器ALMM List-II目前是否强制执行或仍在分阶段推进；采购决策前请以最新MNRE令核实适用范围。]
gap.zht: 市場準入壁壘顯著：即使中國逆變器已持有BIS認證（IS 16221），亦不會自動列入ALMM。對於須遵守ALMM的項目類別（政府項目、淨計量、受補貼項目），未列名的逆變器無論持有何種其他認證，均不得供貨。中國製造商須單獨完成MNRE ALMM註冊（含工廠審核）方可進入上述項目細分市場。[未經核實：逆變器ALMM List-II目前是否強制執行或仍在分階段推進；採購決策前請以最新MNRE令核實適用範圍。]

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for government-funded, net-metered, and subsidy-linked solar projects in India; applicability to inverters under List-II is [UNVERIFIED in full scope]
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — no equivalent regime exists in China for export-bound inverters

source.publisher: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy (MNRE), Government of India

compliance_verdict.en: Chinese grid-tied PV inverter manufacturers face a material market-access gap in India: ALMM listing is a separate, mandatory prerequisite for subsidised and government project supply that BIS certification alone does not satisfy. Manufacturers targeting these segments must initiate MNRE ALMM registration independently. [UNVERIFIED: current mandatory scope of List-II for inverters — verify before advising on specific project eligibility. This is informational only and does not constitute legal or regulatory advice.]
compliance_verdict.zh: 中国并网光伏逆变器制造商在印度面临实质性的市场准入差距：ALMM列名是进入补贴及政府项目的独立强制性前提条件，BIS认证本身不能满足该要求。目标进入上述细分市场的制造商须独立启动MNRE ALMM注册程序。[未经核实：逆变器List-II当前强制适用范围——在就具体项目资格提供建议前请予核实。本内容仅供参考，不构成法律或监管意见。]
compliance_verdict.zht: 中國並網光伏逆變器製造商在印度面臨實質性的市場準入差距：ALMM列名是進入補貼及政府項目的獨立強制性前提條件，BIS認證本身不能滿足該要求。目標進入上述細分市場的製造商須獨立啟動MNRE ALMM註冊程序。[未經核實：逆變器List-II當前強制適用範圍——在就具體項目資格提供建議前請予核實。本內容僅供參考，不構成法律或監管意見。]
